chunks.text: Ptplot - A Java 2D Signal plotter Ptplot - A Java 2D Signal plotter Researchers: Edward A. Lee, Christopher Hylands Brooks Advisor: Edward A. Lee Ptplot is a set of two dimensional signal plotters components written in Java with the following propert

ponents written in Java with the following properties: Embeddable in applets or applications. Auto-ranging. Automatic or manual labeling of axes. Automatic or manual tick marks. Logarithmic axes. Live, animated plots. Infinite zooming. Various plot s

, animated plots. Infinite zooming. Various plot styles: connected lines, scatter plot, bars, etc. Various point styles: none, dots, points, and unique marks. Multiple data sets and a legend. Color or black and white plotting. Error bars. Editable pl

black and white plotting. Error bars. Editable plots. PlotML, and XML language for specifying plots. Compatibility with pxgraph, an older plotting program. The Ptplot home page can be found at: http://ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu/java/ptplot Last updat
